---
title: "Research"
---

## Journal articles

::: {.pub-list}
1. **Board gender diversity and environmental innovation: the role of time horizons and SEW in Chinese family firms.**
   **Zhe Zhai**. *Frontiers in Sustainability*, 6:1714107, 2026. [Journal](https://doi.org/10.3389/frsus.2025.1714107){.pub-link}

2. **Internationalization of innovation and firm performance in the pharmaceutical industry.**
   **Zhe Zhai**, Vivek Ghosal. *International Review of Economics & Finance*, 80:882–905, 2022. [Journal](https://doi.org/10.1016/j.iref.2022.02.058){.pub-link}

3. **Natural disasters and human capital accumulation: evidence from the 1976 Tangshan earthquake.**
   Xinping Tian, Jinquan Gong, **Zhe Zhai**. *Economics of Education Review*, 90:102304, 2022. [Journal](https://doi.org/10.1016/j.econedurev.2022.102304){.pub-link}

4. **The effect of job displacement on labor market outcomes: evidence from the Chinese state-owned enterprise reform.**
   Xinping Tian, Jinquan Gong, **Zhe Zhai**. *China Economic Review*, 72:101743, 2022. [Journal](https://doi.org/10.1016/j.chieco.2022.101743){.pub-link}

5. **Economic impact analysis of GDOT short line railroad infrastructure investment in Georgia.**
   Patrick McCarthy, **Zhe Zhai**. *Research in Transportation Economics*, 77:100728, 2019. [Journal](https://doi.org/10.1016/j.retrec.2019.05.001){.pub-link}
:::

## Grants

- **The Multidimensional Effects and Mechanism Analysis of Corporate Green Innovation on the Enhancement of New Quality Productive Forces.** Faculty Research Grants, Macau University of Science and Technology. *Principal Investigator, 2024–2025.*
- **"Excellent Young Scholars" Program**, Hunan Provincial Department of Education. *Principal Investigator, 2024–2026.*
- **Economic Impact Analysis of GDOT's Short Line Railroads**, Georgia Department of Transportation. *Personnel, 2016–2018.*

## Professional service

- **Referee:** *Journal of International Financial Markets, Institutions & Money*; *Journal of Political Economy Microeconomics*; *China Economic Review*; *Journal of Management Science and Engineering*.
- **External reviewer:** Department of Education, Central University of Finance and Economics.
- **Conference organizing committee**, Xiangjiang Forum, 2022–2023.
- **Guest tutor**, USPTO Patent and Trademark Resource Center at Georgia Institute of Technology, February 2015.
